MC                                                                                                     What is 2+2?           4                          correct        3      incorrect Unnamed: 6 Unnamed: 7 Unnamed: 8

ORD                                                                  Rank the following in their order of operation. Parentheses                        Exponents Division       Addition        NaN        NaN        NaN
FIB                                                                                    The student activities fee is          95 dollars for students enrolled in       19 units or more,        NaN        NaN        NaN
MAT                                                         Match the lower-case greek letter with its capital form.           λ                                Λ        α              γ          Γ          φ          Φ
